cases.prompt: 비개발자도 알아보게 우리 앱 화면 흐름도 만들어서 어디서 막히는지 디버깅하게 해줘

assertions.text: Requires real screen code and stops to ask for the path if none is found
Maps each screen to its user actions, data/server calls (db/rpc/edge/storage/auth) and AI calls with file:line
Adds per-action risk markers, plain-Korean diagnostic checklists, and failure modes
Produces one self-contained interactive flow-debugger.html and verifies the embedded script parses

cases.prompt: make a visual flow debugger so a non-developer can report why a screen is broken

assertions.text: Uses plain Korean labels and hides code identifiers under a separate dev-info section
Includes a bug-report generator that turns a vague symptom into a precise file:line report with dependency path and risk flags
Supports drag-and-drop, connection editing, and a copy-paste prompt to send fixes back to the assistant
